column2: How many employees does your company or organization have?
column3: Is your employer primarily a tech company/organization?
column4: Does your employer provide mental health benefits as part of healthcare coverage?
column5: Do you know the options for mental health care available under your employer-provided coverage?
column6: Has your employer ever formally discussed mental health (for example, as part of a wellness campaign or other official communication)?
column7: Does your employer offer resources to learn more about mental health concerns and options for seeking help?
column8: Is your anonymity protected if you choose to take advantage of mental health or substance abuse treatment resources provided by your employer?
column9: If a mental health issue prompted you to request a medical leave from work, asking for that leave would be:
column10: Do you think that discussing a mental health disorder with your employer would have negative consequences?
column11: Would you feel comfortable discussing a mental health disorder with your coworkers?
column12: Would you feel comfortable discussing a mental health disorder with your direct supervisor(s)?
column13: Do you feel that your employer takes mental health as seriously as physical health?
column14: Have you heard of or observed negative consequences for co-workers who have been open about mental health issues in your workplace?
column16: Have your previous employers provided mental health benefits?
column17: Were you aware of the options for mental health care provided by your previous employers?
column18: Did your previous employers ever formally discuss mental health (as part of a wellness campaign or other official communication)?
column19: Did your previous employers provide resources to learn more about mental health issues and how to seek help?
column20: Was your anonymity protected if you chose to take advantage of mental health or substance abuse treatment resources with previous employers?
column21: Do you think that discussing a mental health disorder with previous employers would have negative consequences?
column22: Would you have been willing to discuss a mental health issue with your previous co-workers?
column23: Would you have been willing to discuss a mental health issue with your direct supervisor(s)?
column24: Did you feel that your previous employers took mental health as seriously as physical health?
column25: Did you hear of or observe negative consequences for co-workers with mental health issues in your previous workplaces?
column26: Would you bring up a mental health issue with a potential employer in an interview?
column27: Do you feel that being identified as a person with a mental health issue would hurt your career?
column28: Do you think that team members/co-workers would view you more negatively if they knew you suffered from a mental health issue?
column29: How willing would you be to share with friends and family that you have a mental illness?
column30: Have you observed or experienced an unsupportive or badly handled response to a mental health issue in your current or previous workplace?
column31: Do you have a family history of mental illness?
column32: Have you ever sought treatment for a mental health issue from a mental health professional?
